name: AudioMax
title: Wireless Over-Ear Headphones
description: Premium noise-canceling wireless headphones with up to 30 hours of continuous battery life and deep bass.

name: SmartFit
title: SmartFit Pro Activity Watch
description: Advanced smartwatch featuring real-time heart rate monitoring, built-in GPS, and 50m water resistance.

name: BrewMaster
title: 12-Cup Programmable Coffee Maker
description: Start your morning right with this programmable coffee maker, complete with a thermal carafe and auto-shutoff.

name: Lumina
title: Modern LED Desk Lamp
description: Dimmable LED desk lamp with 5 color modes, an adjustable neck, and a convenient USB charging port.

name: Nomad
title: Canvas Weekend Duffel Bag
description: Durable, water-resistant canvas duffel bag perfect for short weekend trips and gym sessions.

name: SoundWave
title: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Compact and waterproof Bluetooth speaker delivering 360-degree sound and 12 hours of playtime.

name: KeyChron
title: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: RGB backlit mechanical keyboard with tactile switches for satisfying typing and fast gaming response.

name: ErgoTech
title: Wireless Ergonomic Mouse
description: Designed to reduce wrist strain, this wireless mouse features adjustable DPI and long battery life.

name: VisionPlus
title: 27-inch 4K UHD Monitor
description: Ultra high-definition monitor with vibrant colors, perfect for creative work and immersive gaming.

name: Zenith
title: Eco-Friendly Yoga Mat
description: Non-slip, 6mm thick yoga mat made from environmentally friendly materials. Includes a carrying strap.

name: HydroFlask
title: Insulated Water Bottle
description: Stainless steel water bottle that keeps your drinks ice cold for 24 hours or piping hot for 12 hours.

name: AeroStride
title: Lightweight Running Shoes
description: Breathable mesh running shoes with responsive cushioning to help you go the extra mile.

name: FlexCore
title: Set of 5 Resistance Bands
description: Versatile resistance bands with varying tension levels. Perfect for home workouts and physical therapy.

name: SmilePro
title: Electric Toothbrush
description: Sonic electric toothbrush with 3 brushing modes and a built-in 2-minute timer for optimal oral care.

name: Aura
title: Ionic Hair Dryer
description: Professional-grade hair dryer with negative ion technology to reduce frizz and dry hair faster.

name: NutriBlend
title: High-Speed Personal Blender
description: Make smoothies and shakes on the go with this powerful personal blender. Includes 2 travel cups.

name: CrispChef
title: 5-Quart Digital Air Fryer
description: Enjoy your favorite fried foods with up to 85% less fat. Features a digital touchscreen with 7 presets.

name: GlowSmart
title: Wi-Fi LED Smart Bulb
description: Color-changing smart bulb compatible with Alexa and Google Home. No hub required.

name: PowerBank
title: 10000mAh Portable Charger
description: Ultra-slim power bank with dual USB outputs, capable of charging your phone up to 3 times.

name: Elevate
title: Adjustable Laptop Stand
description: Aluminum laptop stand that improves posture and airflow. Fits most laptops up to 15.6 inches.
